events.name: Golden State Warriors at Toronto Raptors

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes scored 23 points, matched a Raptors franchise record with a career-high 25 rebounds and added 10 assists for his seventh career triple-double as Toronto beat the Golden State Warriors 141-127 in overtime on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes matches Raptors record with 25 rebounds, has a triple-double in OT victory over the Warriors

headlines.description: — Chet Holmgren had 29 points and nine rebounds, and the Oklahoma City Thunder pulled away in the second half for a 129-104 victory over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday, ending a two-game skid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holmgren scores 29, Thunder end 2-game skid with a 129-104 win over the 76ers

headlines.description: — Alex Sarr scored 20 points and blocked a career-best six shots to help the Washington Wizards to a 116-112 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sarr, McCollum lift the Wizards to their second win over the Grizzlies in 9 days, 116-112

events.name: Boston Celtics at Portland Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Shaedon Sharpe scored 26 points including 5 of 8 from 3-point range and the Portland Trail Blazers snapped a three-game losing streak with a 114-108 win over the Boston Celtics on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sharpe scores 26 as Blazers beat Celtics 114-108

headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard scores career-best 55 points, ties Clippers' franchise record

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic scored 34 points, LeBron James had 24, and the Los Angeles Lakers snapped their three-game losing streak with a 125-101 win over the Sacramento Kings on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka Doncic and LeBron James combine for 68 points, Lakers end skid with 125-101 win over Kings
